name: academorix/routing
purpose: Attribute-based routing for Laravel — extends spatie/laravel-route-attributes with a controller base, RouteRegistrar, and NestJS-style HTTP verb decorators.
capabilities: BaseController with Response / Request / Auth / Pagination helpers
when_to_use: Every controller in an Academorix app — attribute-driven routing replaces routes/api.php entirely.
when_not_to_use: For low-level HTTP verb registration outside a controller class, use Laravel's Route facade directly.
